mano_cua.result_summary: selectTextOnFocus输入框聚焦时文本自动全选正常，快速Tab切换后焦点正确停留在非输入框元素上，再次Tab移到下一个元素而非跳回selectTextOnFocus输入框，无焦点陷阱
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After pressing Tab from back button, focus moved to first text input at top of page (correct next element), NOT to selectTextOnFocus input. No focus trap or unexpected behavior. selectTextOnFocus feature works correctly during rapid Tab switching.
